summary: Iteration 4: Admin panel + legal compliance testing COMPLETED. All features working: 1) Registration now enforces accepted_privacy and accepted_rules checkboxes (backend returns 400 without them), 2) Privacy Policy and Rules pages fully functional with comprehensive content, 3) In-app admin panel (/admin) accessible to admin users showing 31 users with delete functionality, 4) Web admin panel (/api/admin-panel) fully functional with login, dashboard, stats (31 users, 22 listings, 3 transactions), and user management. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified and functional.
seed_data_creation: Admin account seeded via POST /api/admin/seed. Credentials: admin@scm.it / admin2024!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 complete. Admin panel and legal compliance fully tested and working. Backend correctly enforces privacy/rules acceptance at registration (server.py lines 293-294). Two admin panels available: 1) In-app mobile panel at /admin (admin.tsx) accessible from profile tab, 2) Web panel at /api/admin-panel (admin_panel.html) with full dashboard. Privacy Policy (/privacy) has 12 sections covering GDPR compliance. Rules page (/rules) has 11 sections. Both pages accessible from profile tab links and registration checkboxes. 31 test users in database, all manageable via admin panels. All previous features (Stripe payments, graphics, macro areas) still functional.

registration_legal_compliance.test_register_with_both_acceptances_succ: PASSED - Returns 200 with token and user data

admin_endpoints.test_admin_login_success: PASSED - Login returns token, /me returns role=admin
admin_endpoints.test_get_admin_users_success: PASSED - Returns list with listings_count and purchases_count
admin_endpoints.test_delete_admin_user_success: PASSED - Deletes user, returns 404 on subsequent GET
admin_endpoints.test_cannot_delete_admin_user: PASSED - Returns 400 when trying to delete admin

admin_panel_html.test_admin_panel_html_accessible: PASSED - Returns HTML with login form and admin panel JS

registration_page.checkbox_links: VERIFIED - Links to /privacy and /rules present in checkbox labels

privacy_policy_page.content: VERIFIED - 12 sections covering GDPR, data collection, user rights, security

rules_page.content: VERIFIED - 11 sections covering community behavior, prohibited items, transactions

web_admin_panel.users_table: VERIFIED - Table with 31 rows, columns: Utente, Email, Zona, Ruolo, Annunci, Acquisti, Privacy, Registrazione, Azioni
web_admin_panel.delete_buttons: VERIFIED - 31 delete buttons present (one per non-admin user)
web_admin_panel.admin_badge: VERIFIED - Admin SCM user has 'Admin' role badge

in_app_admin_panel.access: VERIFIED - Admin users see 'Pannello Admin' button in profile (testID 'admin-panel-btn')
in_app_admin_panel.user_cards: VERIFIED - Each user card shows name, email, zone, stats (annunci, acquisti), registration date
in_app_admin_panel.privacy_indicators: VERIFIED - Cards show 'Privacy accettata' for users who accepted

registration_legal_enforcement.details: Backend enforces accepted_privacy=true and accepted_rules=true. Frontend shows checkboxes with links to legal pages. Users cannot register without accepting both.

privacy_policy.details: Complete GDPR-compliant privacy policy with 12 sections. Accessible from registration checkboxes and profile menu. Last updated: Marzo 2026.

rules_page.details: Complete community rules with 11 sections covering behavior, prohibited items, transactions, violations. Accessible from registration checkboxes and profile menu.

web_admin_panel.details: Standalone web admin panel at /api/admin-panel. Login with admin credentials, view dashboard with stats, manage users (list and delete). Professional UI with Pacifico font matching app design.

in_app_admin_panel.details: Mobile-optimized admin panel accessible from profile tab. Admin users see dedicated button leading to /admin screen. Full user management with delete functionality. Shows user stats and privacy acceptance.

admin_authentication.details: Role-based access control. Regular users get 403 on admin endpoints. Admin role stored in user document. Admin seed endpoint creates admin@scm.it with role='admin'.

positive: Web admin panel uses same color scheme as mobile app (sage green #8DA399)
Registration checkboxes are clearly visible at bottom of form with links to legal pages
Privacy and rules pages have clean, readable layout with proper hierarchy
In-app admin panel follows mobile-first design with card-based user list
Admin badge visible in web panel header confirms admin status
Privacy acceptance indicator shows 'Privacy accettata' on user cards

security_notes: Admin endpoints properly protected with role check (server.py lines 721-724)
Cannot delete admin users (protection at line 744)
Registration requires explicit privacy and rules acceptance (GDPR compliance)
Privacy policy includes GDPR rights: access, rectification, erasure, portability
All users created in this iteration show accepted_privacy_at timestamp
